title: HomeoPatrix
description: Patrix-compatible textures for Homeostatic! Do you like Patrix but don't like the fact that mods have minecraft-ey textures? This fixes that!
body:
This resourcepack makes item, and only item textures of the [Homeostatic](https://modrinth.com/mod/homeostatic) mod fit the style of the [Patrix](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/patrix-32x) resourcepack!

I wanted to have both realistic minecraft textures and mechanics so i put this together, the only function of it to make your modded items fit into the world when using specifically that resourcepack.
I also decided to not retexture the thermometer since its useless as of right now.
See the textures [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/homeopatrix/gallery)!

I only put this crude pack together, they are based on or modified versions of [patrixcraft](https://modrinth.com/user/patrixcraft)'s textures.
The original artist will recieve 100% of the revenue from this project.

You are allowed to include this in a modpack.
